waiver.reason_summary: All gate failures in this run are pre-existing on the target branch and demonstrably unrelated to the commits being pushed; the author has verified no new regressions were introduced.
waiver.detail: Primary-branch pre-push gate failures were pre-existing and unrelated to ws-0381: stale discovery artifacts, stale generated SLO assets, existing ansible-lint debt, existing ansible-syntax role-resolution failure on the build runner, existing policy/schema/security/tofu/semgrep/integration-test failures, and remote-runner image/dependency gaps surfaced during the promotion attempt.
